title: Build Board from Excel
excerpt: Is there a way to build a board and it’s structure from an Excel file? I know that you are able to import data and map out columns for a new board, but can you create the groups, items, and subitems solely in Excel and i…

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to build a board and it’s structure from an Excel file? I know that you are able to import data and map out columns for a new board, but can you create the groups, items, and subitems solely in Excel and import so that the structure of the board is built from the import? Primarily looking for that group/item/subitem functionality.
